title: Carex ovczinnikovii
taxonomy: Carex ovczinnikovii is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is a type of flowering plant that is part of the genus Carex. The genus Carex is a large and diverse group of plants, often referred to as sedges or rushes. Within the family Cyperaceae, Carex ovczinnikovii is classified as a member of the subfamily Caricoideae. This classification helps to group similar plants together based on their shared characteristics and evolutionary history.
